diagnostic: Recovery is a band-aid. Prevention is the cure. A boardroom of legendary CXO agents handles the first 90% of decisions autonomously so the founder's remaining bandwidth is spent only on the 10% that truly requires human judgment.
answer: Recovery is a band-aid. Prevention is the cure. A boardroom of legendary CXO agents handles the first 90% of decisions autonomously so the founder's remaining bandwidth is spent only on the 10% that truly requires human judgment.
description: Human bandwidth ceiling — the leader moves from finance to marketing to production in a single afternoon, crushed by context switches.
symptom: 15–25 hours per week in alignment meetings. Decision fatigue. Founder burnout. Family strain.
